text.title: Weekly GSC Diagnostic Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Weekly GSC Diagnostic Template.

example.scenario: 200-page docs site at $2K MRR. Monday 09:00 review: 5 winners up (cli install +42), 5 losers (ai marketplace -18); intent mismatch on /ai-marketplace; indexed ratio 0.82 healthy; action: rewrite /ai-marketplace landing, owner @ruslan, due Friday.
